response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience as a full-stack developer with a strong background in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, aligning well with the job requirements. They have worked on various projects involving AI agent development and have a solid understanding of cloud platforms and containerization.
strengths: Proficient in TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Experience with AI agent development and infrastructure
Strong background in full-stack development with diverse technology stack
concerns: Career gap in 2025 due to caregiving
Lack of direct experience with Nest.js and Vitest
Limited experience with Kotlin/Java for backend services
